title: Media and Power 2009
description: The study charted the relationship between the media and political decision-making in Finland. Representatives of the Finnish decision-making system answered questions focusing on themes such as the use of power in the Finnish society, media use, cooperation between decision-makers and journalists, influence of the media on decision-making, and journalism and political publicity. The data are part of "Media as a Holder and a Vehicle of Power" research project. The aim of this survey was to test
